# info.txt — af info for one workstream, including the ledger tail.
#
# Fixture: session "alpha" with a state.toml and a three-event
# ledger.jsonl (created → suspended → resumed).
# Scenarios:
#   1. plain info            → text summary, no events section.
#   2. --ledger 2            → only the last two ledger events shown.
#   3. --json --ledger 1     → schema-1 envelope with session + events.
#   4. failure               → unknown session name errors (no state.toml).

env HOME=$WORK/home

# ── Scenario 1: text summary ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
exec af info alpha
stdout 'Session:   alpha'
stdout 'Status:    active'
stdout 'Branch:    feat/alpha'
stdout 'Base:      main'
stdout 'Repo:      github.com/owner/repo'
! stdout 'Recent events:'

# ── Scenario 2: --ledger N appends the last N events ──────────────────────────
exec af info alpha --ledger 2
stdout 'Recent events:'
stdout '2026-05-21 13:00:00 suspended'
stdout '2026-05-21 14:00:00 resumed'
# The oldest event falls outside the tail window of 2.
! stdout '2026-05-21 12:00:00 created'

# ── Scenario 3: --json envelope carries session + events ──────────────────────
exec af info alpha --json --ledger 1
stdout '"schema": 1'
stdout '"Name": "alpha"'
stdout '"Type": "resumed"'
! stdout '"Type": "suspended"'

# ── Scenario 4 (failure): unknown session name ────────────────────────────────
! exec af info nope
stderr 'nope'
stderr 'no such file or directory'

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/alpha/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000000a"
name = "alpha"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-21T12:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/wt/alpha"
branch = "feat/alpha"
base_branch = "main"
repo_slug = "github.com/owner/repo"

[execution]
tmux_session = "af-alpha"

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/alpha/ledger.jsonl --
{"ts":"2026-05-21T12:00:00Z","event":"created","agent":"pi","branch":"feat/alpha"}
{"ts":"2026-05-21T13:00:00Z","event":"suspended"}
{"ts":"2026-05-21T14:00:00Z","event":"resumed"}
